title: ophrys insectifera subsp. aranifera
intro: Ophrys insectifera subsp. aranifera, commonly known as the Spider Orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Spider Orchid include its potential to reduce coughs, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal conditions.
